zh.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish是Hugh de Standish的女兒，於1376年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什。她於1395年3月13日與Sir John Radcliffe II結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年7月26日在英國藍卡爾享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Clementina
meanings: A female name formed from Clement.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish was born in 1376, in Standish, Lancashire, England as the daughter of Hugh de Standish. She married Sir John Radcliffe II on 13 March 1395. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 July 1442, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish est née en 1376, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, fille de Hugh de Standish. Elle a épousé Sir John Radcliffe II le 13 mars 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1442, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish wurde 1376 in Standish, Lancashire, England, als Tochter von Hugh de Standish geboren. Sie hat am 13. März 1395 Sir John Radcliffe II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1442 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish è nata il nel 1376 nel Standish, Lancashire, England come figlia di Hugh de Standish. Lei sposato Sir John Radcliffe II il 13 marzo 1395. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 luglio 1442, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Clementina Standishは1376年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュでHugh de Standishの娘として生まれた。1395年3月13日にSir John Radcliffe IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年7月26日にイギリスランカシュアイアで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish(은)는 1376년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Hugh de Standish의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1395년 3월 13일 Sir John Radcliffe II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 7월 26일 영국 랭카실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish nasceu em 1376, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra filha de Hugh de Standish. Ela casou-se com Sir John Radcliffe II em 13 de março de 1395. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1442, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish родилась в 1376 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия. Её отца звали Hugh de Standish. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Radcliffe II 13 марта 1395 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 июля 1442 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Clementina Standish nació en 1376, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hija de Hugh de Standish. Se casó con Sir John Radcliffe II el 13 de marzo de 1395. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de julio de 1442, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
